_comment: External MoP/EoP authorization records — the SOURCE OF TRUTH is the site change-management / CAB system, NOT this app. This file (and POST /api/authorizations) is how those external decisions are provided to the FDD app as data. The app reads these to show whether a grounded MoP/EoP recommendation is already authorized to execute; it never creates or approves them. Fields (status, cab_ticket, approved_by, source, validity) are copied verbatim from the external system.
